patch.value: Agent-UX output polish: unknown-option errors should suggest valid flags; list-closed projection too verbose; schema add-field help discoverability

From 2026-07-02 audit (Lane A, pm-kes3): (1) unknown-option errors do not list valid flags or a nearest-match suggestion, forcing an extra contracts round-trip (agents should never be blocked by wrong flags); (2) pm list-closed defaults to the full projection (verbose for agents; closed queries are usually triage scans); (3) pm schema add-field help is buried in the shared option list, hard to discover the field-definition flags.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 sandbox repro: pm extension scaffold <name> --capability commands --directory <path> fails with unknown_option and next_steps offer NO nearest-flag suggestion (scaffold has no --directory; scaffolds into <cwd>/<name>). Guidance should either suggest closest supported flags for the subcommand or state the target-directory behavior.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 sandbox audit adds two output-verbosity nits to this polish bundle: pm init prints all 21 created dirs as full absolute paths (relative paths + count would do); pm extension --list/--doctor repeat long absolute roots and managed-source blocks per extension. Core toon outputs (list/get/context) measured compact (~89 chars/item).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 partial progress landed in working tree and verified from fresh tarball pack: (1) pm context <id> now returns dedicated guidance (context_takes_no_item_argument) pointing to pm get <id> / pm context --parent <id>; (2) known-package command hints expanded 4→16 aliases (shell/completion*, comments-audit, dedupe-audit/merge, normalize, reindex, search-advanced, test-runs) with duplicate next-step dedup; (3) extension describe not-found error now lists loaded extension names. STILL OPEN from this bundle: nearest-flag suggestion for unknown_option (scaffold --directory repro still generic), pm init 21-absolute-path verbosity, extension --list/--doctor root repetition.
